name: GetTruncatedCone
summary: Class provides user interface to define a truncated cone.

constructors.name: GetTruncatedCone
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GetTruncatedCone class

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: Get
methods.summary: Prompt for the getting of a truncated cone.

params.name: truncatedCone
params.doc: The truncated cone in Brep form.

returns.doc: The result of the getting operation.

methods.name: GetMesh(Int32, Int32, Mesh)
methods.signature: public Result GetMesh(ref int verticalFaces, ref int aroundFaces, out Mesh truncatedCone)
methods.summary: Prompt for the getting of a mesh truncated cone.

params.name: verticalFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the vertical direction.

params.name: aroundFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the around direction

params.name: truncatedCone
params.doc: The truncated cone in Mesh form.

returns.doc: The result of the getting operation.

methods.name: GetMesh(Int32, Int32, Int32, Mesh)
methods.signature: public Result GetMesh(ref int verticalFaces, ref int aroundFaces, ref int capStyle, out Mesh truncatedCone)
methods.summary: Prompt for the getting of a mesh truncated cone.
methods.remarks: The prompt for capStyle will only be seen if it's not zero, aroundFaces is even and the solid option is on.

params.name: verticalFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the vertical direction.

params.name: aroundFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the around direction

params.name: capStyle
params.doc: Set to 0 if you don't want the prompt, 3 is triangles, 4 is quads.

params.name: truncatedCone
params.doc: The truncated cone in Mesh form.

returns.doc: The result of the getting operation.

properties.name: Cap
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether or not the output should be capped.

properties.name: CylinderConstraint
properties.summary: State of the cone/cylinder constraint option. When the cone/cylinder option is selected, the circle is being made as a base for a cone/cylinder. By default the vertical cone/cylinder option not available but is not selected. By default the "Vertical" option applies to VerticalCircle.

properties.name: DefaultSize
properties.summary: Default radius or diameter (based on InDiameterMode)

properties.name: InDiameterMode
properties.summary: Determines if the "size" value is representing a radius or diameter
